title: Nvidia discloses 9.3% stake in AI cloud company Nebius
excerpt: Nebius stock rose 7% in premarket trading Tuesday after a filing showed Nvidia holds roughly 22.26 million shares in the neocloud firm
content_html:
Nebius stock climbed 7% in premarket trading on Tuesday after Nvidia disclosed a 9.3% stake in the Amsterdam-based AI cloud company. According to a filing released Monday, the position totals approximately 22.26 million shares, a figure that incorporates shares tied to a warrant Nvidia received through its $2 billion investment in the company.

The filing noted that Nvidia cannot exercise the warrant until after September 11. Nebius stock had already risen 3% in aftermarket trade Monday after the disclosure.

Under the terms of the deal, announced earlier this year, the two companies are working together across areas such as AI infrastructure deployment, fleet management, inference, and AI factory design and support. Nebius, which was spun off from Russian search engine firm Yandex, is listed on the Nasdaq and has a market cap of $46 billion as of Tuesday morning.

Nebius is also a customer of Nvidia's chips. Nebius has set a goal of reaching more than 5 gigawatts of total computing capacity before the end of 2030, according to Investing.com. Nebius and CoreWeave both fall into the category of neocloud companies — data center operators whose business is built around serving AI workloads.

Nebius and Nvidia have been approached for comment, according to CNBC.

In March, Meta signed a long-term agreement to spend up to $27 billion on Nebius' AI infrastructure, according to CNBC. Last week, Nebius said it had raised $775 million in its first senior secured debt facility, backed by deployed GPU infrastructure and contracted cash flows from an investment-grade customer.

Freedom Capital Markets upgraded Nebius to a buy rating on Monday, calling the debt raise a "positive catalyst" for the company.

Nvidia has deployed similar-sized investments across a range of firms, including a separate $2 billion deal with semiconductor company Marvell Technology, as well as Synopsys, CoreWeave, Coherent, and Lumentum. Nvidia put $30 billion into OpenAI's $110 billion round announced in March and also took part in Anthropic's $30 billion fundraise the previous month.

Some analysts and investors have flagged what Goldman Sachs has called "the increasing circularity of the AI ecosystem," in which a concentrated group of chip companies, cloud providers, and AI labs finance one another's buildouts. Nvidia has told analysts that its cross-investments are small relative to its overall revenue and that the companies it backs earn the majority of their revenue from outside customers.

sentences.zh: 一些分析师和投资者指出了高盛所说的“人工智能生态系统的循环性日益增强”，其中芯片公司、云提供商和人工智能实验室集中在一起，为彼此的扩建提供资金。

content_html_zh:
在英伟达披露其持有这家总部位于阿姆斯特丹的人工智能云公司 9.3% 的股份后，周二 Nebius 股价在盘前交易中上涨 7%。 根据周一发布的一份文件，该头寸总计约 2226 万股，其中包括与 Nvidia 通过投资 20 亿美元获得的认股权证相关的股票。

文件指出，英伟达要到 9 月 11 日之后才能行使搜查令。 消息披露后，周一盘后交易中 Nebius 股价已上涨 3%。

根据今年早些时候宣布的交易条款，两家公司将在人工智能基础设施部署、车队管理、推理以及人工智能工厂设计和支持等领域开展合作。 Nebius 是从俄罗斯搜索引擎公司 Yandex 分拆出来的，在纳斯达克上市，截至周二上午，其市值为 460 亿美元。

Nebius也是Nvidia芯片的客户。 据 Investing.com 报道，Nebius 设定的目标是在 2030 年底前达到超过 5 吉瓦的总计算能力。 Nebius 和 CoreWeave 都属于新云公司——数据中心运营商，其业务围绕人工智能工作负载提供服务。

据 CNBC 报道，已联系 Nebius 和 Nvidia 征求意见。

据 CNBC 报道，今年 3 月，Meta 签署了一项长期协议，斥资 270 亿美元用于 Nebius 的人工智能基础设施。 上周，Nebius 表示，其首笔高级担保债务融资已筹集 7.75 亿美元，由部署的 GPU 基础设施和来自投资级客户的合同现金流提供支持。

Freedom Capital Markets 周一将 Nebius 评级提升至买入评级，称此次债务融资对该公司来说是“积极的催化剂”。

Nvidia 已在一系列公司中部署了类似规模的投资，包括与半导体公司 Marvell Technology、Synopsys、CoreWeave、Coherent 和 Lumentum 单独达成的 20 亿美元交易。 Nvidia 在 3 月份宣布的 OpenAI 1100 亿美元融资中投入了 300 亿美元，并参与了 Anthropic 上个月的 300 亿美元融资。

一些分析师和投资者指出了高盛所说的“人工智能生态系统的循环性日益增强”，其中芯片公司、云提供商和人工智能实验室集中在一起，为彼此的扩建提供资金。 英伟达告诉分析师，其交叉投资相对于其整体收入而言很小，而且其支持的公司大部分收入来自外部客户。
